title: calea nematophylla
intro: Calea nematophylla, also known as Mexican Damiana or yerba de la pasionaria, is a shrub-like plant native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic effects, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Calea nematophylla include relieving anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of Calea nematophylla can be found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
